metadata.description: Port skills, plugins, and hooks between Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI automatically, from a single source of truth, with no double maintenance. Install the porter for your agent and the other agent's skills appear natively on every session start.

plugins.name: codex-to-claude
plugins.description: Run INSIDE Claude Code: on every session start, mirror your OpenAI Codex CLI skills into Claude so they work natively — no duplicate authoring. Requires the Rust toolchain (builds a fast porter binary on first run).
